nasb.text: To the larger group you shall increase their inheritance, and to the smaller group you shall diminish their inheritance; each shall be given their inheritance according to those who were numbered of them.

esv.text: To a large tribe you shall give a large inheritance, and to a small tribe you shall give a small inheritance; every tribe shall be given its inheritance in proportion to its list.

cnv.text: 人數多的，你要把產業多分給他們；人數少的，你要把產業少分給他們；要按著數點的人數，把產業分給各家族。

ccb.text: 人数多的多分产业，人数少的少分产业，要按登记的人数分配。
